generation.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: central tile-kind glyph for a premium mobile game map
Primary request: a single neutral explorer trail marker made from three simple stacked path stones, read instantly as an ordinary walkable route tile rather than a direction arrow, warning, house, facility, reward, or item.
Scene/backdrop: one perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for local alpha removal.
Subject: centered compact three-stone cairn / path pebble silhouette, clean geometric edges, no arrowhead, no lettering.
Style/medium: monochrome Kenney-like board-game icon, bold even dark ink silhouette, simple high-contrast bitmap-ready shape.
Composition/framing: one glyph centered in a square 128x128 canvas with generous padding, no other objects.
Lighting/mood: flat graphic, no shadows, no gradients.
Color palette: near-black warm ink subject only on green key background.
Constraints: keep one clear silhouette, no text, no numbers, no logo, no watermark, no skull, no triangle, no bag, no swirl, no arrow, no house, no coin.
Avoid: texture, perspective, 3D rendering, thin detail, multiple variants, border, frame, background variation.

license.kenney_reference: style reference only; not claimed as Kenney source
